channel.title: Comparative Politics on Andre Walter
channel.description: Recent content in Comparative Politics on Andre Walter

item.title: Talks 2018
item.description: There are a couple of upcoming talks and conferences in 2018 where I’ll present some of my ongoing work. I’m going to cover the following topics at the ECPR im Hamburg, the DVPW in Frankfurt a.M., the ESPAnet in Vilnius and the Political Science Department Seminar in Tübingen: A Socialist Threat? Radical Party Entry, Electoral Competition, and the Formation of Alliances in Majoritarian Systems (Tübingen; ECPR; DVPW) The Social Origins of Christian Democracy.

item.title: HSG International Fellowship
item.description: I’ve got news that I have been awared with the International Postdoctoral Fellowship! This great opportunity allows me to conduct independent research for up to three years on a number of topics of my choosing at the University of St. Gallen. I planning to focus on two projects: The introduction of proportional representation I haven written a piece with Patrick Emmenegger on the introduction of PR for the election of the Swiss National Council (currently under review).
